intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (4°C, 10°C), thermocycling. (volumes 10µL-200µL, ~38 min total)
intent: For the Illumina DNA Prep - BMS protocol, you'll be working with the sample plate in the magnetic module (slot 2), reagent reservoirs, and the thermocycler modules set to 4°C initially. Start by pausing for any manual checks, then proceed through the tagmentation steps with 20µL mixing volumes (3 times each) and TagMixRep cycles, followed by thermocycler runs and the 60-minute ERAT incubation. The magnetic bead separations require specific height gradients (8.5mm → 7mm → 5mm) with 1-minute incubations at each level, and you'll perform two wash cycles with 100µL TWB and 10µL transfers between 6-second waits. Complete the protocol with PCR amplification (1 + 5 + 1 cycles), dual AMPure cleanups using 40µL beads mixed at 60µL volume, ethanol washes, and final elution in RSB buffer with 4-minute magnetic separation before transferring the cleaned libraries to the final plate.
